notes: Installs one public skill: agent-memory-stack-lite-demo. The context-memory workflow is internal.
v0.2.4 polishes unfinished/parallel task prompts with Lite Demo 提醒, a one-line task name, and prior progress.
Lite Demo 提醒 is limited to memory routing, memory/risk boundaries, and clear overlap warnings; it is not used for ordinary progress reports.
Separate task memory does not claim project-file isolation. When evidence shows overlap, Lite Demo says memory can be separate but project files are the same.
Lite Demo keeps memory active while retreating its fallback engineering flow when an existing task protocol is detected.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback.
Updater verifies SHA256 before install and rereads the installed version before reporting success.
